name: Nuculus Bar Power
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup of oat bran with half a cup of toasted sunflower and/or sesame seeds (ground in a food processor).
2. Add half a cup of soy milk powder (the brand used contains 37% maltodextrin, approximately 20% dextrose) to the mixture.
3. Include half a cup of raisins, 2 tablespoons of carob powder, and stir well.
4. Mix in half a cup of cooked and minced brown rice (processed again if necessary).
5. Incorporate half a cup of peanut butter (adjust quantity for desired consistency).
6. Add half a cup of honey (clear, runny preferred; may need warming or slight water addition to thin).
7. Stir the mixture until well combined.
8. If needed, add more oat bran or rolled oats and mix thoroughly using a cake mixer.
9. Allow the bars to rest for about an hour; this helps them bind together.
10. Roll or press the mixture into bars approximately 1 cm thick and cut into desired size (about 16 pieces at ~1 cm x 1.5 cm x 6 cm).
